name: Stir Fried Scallops
recipeIngredient: 1 Clove garlic, peeled and pressed flat
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine lemon juice, soy sauce, honey, minced ginger, and pressed garlic in a medium bowl. Stir to dissolve the honey.
2. Add scallops and toss until evenly coated.
3. Prepare the remaining part of the meal.
4. Heat a heavy iron skillet or wok over high heat for 3 minutes.
5. Add oil and heat another 30 seconds.
6. Add scallops and stir constantly, cooking about 3 minutes (less time if using bay scallops).
7. Serve with peas or snow peas. Pass extra soy sauce and Oriental sesame oil on the side.
